summary.window_expansion_reason: Strict 72h window (May 22-25) held ≤3 items not already covered by bulletins on May 22, 23, and 24. Expanded to 5 days per standard rule.

items_published.title: Intuit cuts 3,000 jobs, redirects budget to AI agent development for QuickBooks and TurboTax

key_claims.claim: US severance: 16 weeks base pay + 2 weeks per year of service

items_published.title: Alibaba ships Qwen 3.7 Max in preview: 1M-token agentic model, API on OpenRouter from May 21
items_published.tier_nuance: qwen.ai primary returned no content; confirmed via TechNode and OpenRouter. Benchmark claims vendor-stated.

key_claims.claim: 35-hour autonomous kernel optimization run, ~10x speedup claimed

items_published.caveats: Preview only (-Preview suffix). No open-weight version. Benchmark claims vendor-run on Alibaba's own chip hardware.

items_published.title: Anthropic tells investors it projects $10.9B Q2 revenue and first operating profit of $559M
items_published.tier_nuance: Investor disclosure during fundraising, not a public Anthropic announcement. No company primary source exists.

key_claims.source: Bloomberg and CNBC citing investor disclosure (T3)

key_claims.claim: Claude Code annualized revenue >$1B within 6 months of launch

items_published.caveats: Investor-disclosed projections during fundraising have documented optimism bias. No Anthropic primary source. Profitability not expected Q3-Q4 2026.

items_published.title: Trump postpones AI executive order after tech industry pressure, policy future uncertain
items_published.tier_nuance: Draft order contents from press reporting on unpublished document. Trump statement is T2; draft framework details are T2-T3.

key_claims.claim: 90-day NSA-involved pre-launch review framework in draft
Trump stated he was concerned the order could have been a blocker

items_published.caveats: Draft order not publicly released. Full text not available. No revised timeline announced.

items_published.title: Pope Leo XIV publishes Magnifica Humanitas, the first papal encyclical on artificial intelligence

key_claims.claim: Presented by Pope Leo XIV alongside Christopher Olah (Anthropic co-founder)

items_dropped.title: Grok connectors: Vercel, Canva, Gamma, S&P Global
TeamPCP supply chain attack: GitHub, OpenAI, Mistral
Walmart Sparky Q1: WAUs doubled, 35% AOV lift
Jack Clark Oxford AI self-improvement forecasts
items_dropped.reason: Speculative forward-looking predictions; no verifiable product claim

items_dropped.title: Meta workforce reduction (~8,000)
items_dropped.reason: Corporate workforce news; AI product coverage out of scope

items_dropped.title: OpenAI macOS code-signing certificate revocation
items_dropped.reason: Follow-up to TeamPCP item; covered in 2026-05-24 bulletin context

items_dropped.title: Anthropic KPMG alliance (276,000 employees)
items_dropped.reason: Outside expanded window; covered in prior bulletin

limitations.login_walled: X timelines, LinkedIn, IG, Discord not directly accessed. Social posts checked via search-indexed results.
limitations.window_expansion: Strict 72h window (May 22-25) held only 3 items not covered by prior bulletins; expanded to 5 days per standard rule.
limitations.sea_coverage: One dedicated SEA/Indonesia search yielded no in-window AI product launches. Coverage is US/EU/China-heavy.

secondary_items_upgrade_path.Qwen 3.7 Max: Independent benchmark evaluation; qwen.ai primary page access
secondary_items_upgrade_path.Anthropic $10.9B projection: Q2 actuals due after June 30, 2026; or public Anthropic financial announcement
